column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `legal/eu/rights` extension <-> Charter of Fundamental Rights of the European Union (CFREU, 2012/C 326/02) article alignment. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) - each DPV rights class names a Charter article in its local identifier (e.g. `A8ProtectionOfPersonalData` <-> CFREU A8), so the seeded `skos:exactMatch` rows are straightforward; titles T1–T7 map to the corresponding Charter titles. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` per the Semantic Mapping Vocabulary and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.
